title: 1959 Boinai sighting included in recently released US UFO files
description: Previously secret files documenting investigations into sightings of UFOs have been released by the US Government, and they make mention of two incidents in Papua New Guinea.

title: New Claims of Extraterrestrial Species Spark UFO Debate
description: Recent claims regarding the recovery of remains from four different extraterrestrial species have sparked renewed interest and debate within the UFO disclosure community. Dr. Hal Puthoff, a former Pentagon adviser, shared insights on a podcast, suggesting that these beings may want to be seen. The discussion includes various alleged species such as Grays, Reptilians, and Insectoids, with advocates calling for greater transparency from the government. As the Trump administration pushes for more information on UAPs, the conversation around extraterrestrial life continues to evolve, raising questions about what the government truly knows.

title: Starmer should 'do a Trump' and release Britain’s X-Files, top UFO researcher says
description: Mark Christopher Lee says the UK Government can no longer expect to keep its reported close encounters quiet following the US President's decision to open up America's to the public

title: Pentagon deploys AI to search PURSUE database for UAP patterns across decades of military data
description: The Department of War is using AI to scan its PURSUE database of UAP reports, processing millions of gigabytes of radar, sonar, and visual data. The system also scrubs classified details from files before public release.

title: UFO Caught on Camera Over Columbia Sky? Unverified Video Goes Viral
description: A viral video from Colombia has sparked fresh UFO speculation, capturing a rapid, smooth metallic orb identical to last year's 'Buga Sphere'. While scientists discovered a highly advanced internal architecture - including a low-density core and fiber-optic-like wires - experts lean toward it being a sophisticated, human-made device as the unverified video goes viral.
